# oms-start-client — LLM Reference

Client marketing site initializer. Bootstraps from client-marketing-template — faster than /oms-start because stack, sections, tokens, and task queue are pre-built. Use for any local business client website.

## Triggers — use /oms-start-client when

- Starting a new client website project (any industry)
- CEO has a new client and needs a site scaffolded quickly
- Converting a client intake into a running OMS project

Do NOT use for: SaaS products, internal tools, custom-architecture projects — use /oms-start for those.

## Invocation

```
/oms-start-client                           # prompts for minimum input
/oms-start-client Pho Saigon 88, San Jose   # inline client name + city
```

## What it does

1. Collects: name, city, goal, optional Drive URL (max 5 questions)
2. Research agent auto-fills: industry, colors, services, customer language, competitors
3. Selects token preset from industry + visual research
4. Clones template → new project dir at ~/code/clients/[slug]/
5. Runs scripts/init-client.ts → generates all config + ctx files
6. Triggers /oms-work → M1 starts immediately

## What it does NOT do

- Does not ask for approval on every data point — researches and decides
- Does not block on media — Drive sync is M3, not M1
- Does not re-ask questions already answered
- Does not run /oms-exec — queue is pre-built from template

## Key paths

- Template source:  ~/.claude/templates/client-marketing-template/
- Client projects:  ~/code/clients/[client-slug]/
- Intake file:      [project]/client-intake.json
- Research output:  [project]/client-profile.json
